content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

October 23, 1990

Patrick Kurihara  
14607 Ave. 412  
Orosi, CA 93647

Re: Your Request for Confirmation of Telephone Advice  
Our File No. A-90-609

Dear Mr. Kurihara:

We have received your letter dated September 13, 1990, seeking written confirmation of the telephone advice I provided on September 18, 1990 regarding your registration responsibilities under the Political Reform Act ("the Act").1

Your letter accurately summarizes the advice that I provided to you. As we discussed during our telephone conversation, your parents group wishes to collect contributions and make expenditures in support of various candidates for the Cutler-Orosi Unified School District Board of Trustees. So long as your parents group neither receives contributions in an amount of $1,000 or more in a calendar year nor makes independent expenditures totaling $1,000 or more in a calendar year, your group need not register or file disclosure reports under the Act's campaign provisions. (Section 82013.)

If you have any further questions regarding this matter please contact me at (916) 322-5901.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin  
Acting General Counsel

By: Mark T. Morodomi  
Counsel, Legal Division

SH:MTM:dg

1 Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated.
